visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a high-energy graphic intro featuring the Costco Wholesale logo, a cartoon character, and bold pink and yellow text overlays. The background shows the interior of a brightly lit warehouse store with tall metal shelving and fluorescent lights hanging from a white industrial ceiling. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of vacuum-packed chicken breast packages organized in a refrigerated display case; price information in yellow and white text appears centrally. (3) A shot of packaged marbled beef slices follows, showing the texture of the meat behind plastic wrap under clear, even lighting. (4) The camera shows a tall stack of Five Flowers brand kitchen paper towels in blue and white packaging, with shoppers' silhouettes visible in the distant background. (5) Transition to a view of Ariel laundry detergent boxes stacked on pallets, with the white industrial floor and distant shoppers providing a sense of scale in the large warehouse environment. (6) A series of fast cuts displays various snack items like Hi-Chew and Loacker cookies on shelves; the camera remains mostly static for each product shot but switches rapidly between items. (7) Further shots include crates of milk, yogurt containers, and trays of chicken legs and donuts, all captured under the same bright, consistent warehouse lighting with large price text overlays dominating the center of the frame.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 好市多. [Slogan]: 每週特價速報 10/13~10/19 記得追蹤我們. (2) [Subtitle]: 台灣雞胸肉 真空包. [Slogan]: 原價215/KG -45 特價170/KG. (3) [Subtitle]: 美國特選 冷凍肩小排燒烤片. [Slogan]: 原價899/KG -180 特價719/KG. (4) [Subtitle]: 五月花 三層抽取式廚房紙巾. [Slogan]: 原價419 -84 特價335. (5) [Subtitle]: ARIEL 抗菌抗臭洗衣精 補充包. [Slogan]: 原價859 -180 特價679. (6) [Subtitle]: 森永嗨啾軟糖 綜合水果口味. [Slogan]: 原價259 -53 特價206.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Approximately 12 unique individuals seen as distant shoppers or staff in the background throughout the various warehouse shots.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consistently features the interior of a Costco warehouse, including metal storage racks, refrigerated glass cases, wooden pallets, and large-scale product displays under industrial lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy, fast-tempo electronic pop music featuring a heavy synth-driven beat. A male narrator with an enthusiastic and projected tone shouts the channel's greeting and the video's theme. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition as the narrator begins a rapid-fire reading of the first product name and its discounted price. (3) Another percussive 'hit' sound effect accompanies the next visual cut, with the narrator maintaining a high speech rate and rhythmic delivery synchronized with the background music's pulse. (4) The sequence continues with recurring 'whoosh' and 'pop' transition sound effects every two seconds, as the narrator cyclically introduces new grocery items and price points without pause. (5) The background music remains constant in its energetic major mode, while the vocal track is clean and prominently mixed above the instrumental layer, ending with a final high-pitched vocal flourish from the speaker.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a rapid and efficient summary of current promotional discounts at Costco Wholesale in Taiwan, aimed at budget-conscious shoppers looking for deal updates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed pricing information, product close-ups, and explicit promotion of weekly specials at a specific retailer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses high-frequency editing and rhythmic audio-visual synchronization typical of social-native 'deal-hunting' content to maintain high viewer retention.
